description: Typed orchestration for self-improving retrieval systems. Deno-first, edge-safe. createLoop() is the entry point: seed, select, ingest. Every cycle compounds.
rules: Use createLoop() as the recommended entry point — it wires store, embedding, critic from a declarative config
Import from jsr:@semantic-loop/core or mod.ts — named exports only
All scores must be clamped to [0, 1] using clamp()
All interfaces use readonly fields — never mutate state
Use store: 'memory' for testing, store: 'supabase' for production
Web-standard APIs only: fetch, Request, Response, crypto.subtle
Engine is stateless — all state lives in the MemoryStore
